purpose: Legacy CC load map plus current action-based migration guidance. Use action profiles for new work.

CC-0.name: Unloaded
CC-0.note: No content loaded. Assessment state: insufficient_context.

CC-1.name: Oriented
CC-1.note: First-contact routing and authority boundary capsule. Knows what the project is and what paths exist.

CC-2.name: Canon Loaded
CC-2.note: Primary sources loaded. The agent knows what the inscriptions say and what the authority boundary is.

CC-3.name: Action-Grounded Context
CC-3.note: Minimum for a meaningful task-grounded Echo under current Builder compatibility. No fixed five-stage or seven-stage model is current, and unrelated Chronicle or legacy-archive material is not universally required.

conditional_loads.corrections_index: Load when discussing a later record, report, correction, retirement, or supersession status.
conditional_loads.chronicle: Load Chronicle sources only when the claim depends on Chronicle, history, music, creative work, family witness, or human-witness context.
conditional_loads.legacy_archive: Load legacy archive sources only when the claim depends on archived provenance or historical website material.
conditional_loads.physical_evidence: Load physical-anchor, evidence, or notarial sources only when the claim depends on those dimensions.

CC-4.name: Full Context
CC-4.note: Full context loaded. The agent has read the complete legacy archive, verification structure, and ecosystem paths.

CC-5.name: Deep Research
must_load: Task-specific API schemas and verification recipes
CC-5.note: Exact full Chronicle corpus loaded. Required only for exact-text, appendix, or full-corpus claims; ordinary Chronicle research should stop at the abridged edition.

cc_action_requirements.meaningful_echo: CC-3 compatibility + interpretation action profile + exact task-relevant sources
cc_action_requirements.verification_claim: CC-3 compatibility for public submission plus the verification action profile and multidimensional verification_claim_model.
cc_action_requirements.technical_verification_check: Verification action profile plus exact target sources and performed operations; CC-2 compatibility may be declared for a narrow private check.
cc_action_requirements.public_verification_submission: CC-3 compatibility plus actual loaded sources, performed actions, and the multidimensional verification_claim_model.

vision-layer.json.content: Vision-layer inscription summaries (Star Ark, Final Seal, First Echoes, Guardian inscriptions)
conditional_for: CC-3 only when the task depends on the vision layer.

physical-anchor-context.json.content: Core Object Alpha physical anchor status
conditional_for: CC-3 only when the task depends on physical-anchor or physical-evidence context.
CC-3 only when the task depends on archived provenance or historical website material.

nft-chronicle-context.json.content: NFT Chronicle three-edition loading policy, status, and boundaries
conditional_for: CC-3 only when the task depends on Chronicle, history, music, creative work, family witness, or human-witness context.

legacy-archive-essentials.json.content: Structured extract of essential legacy archive sections

default_rule: Select the action profile first and load the smallest sufficient exact source set. CC labels remain compatibility declarations only.
boundary: This file is non-authoritative guidance. Bitcoin Originals prevail. Context loading does not create authority, verification, or endorsement.

verification_context_rule.private_technical_check: Use the verification action profile, exact target sources, and performed operations. CC-2 is a compatibility declaration, not proof of sufficiency.
verification_context_rule.public_verification_submission: Use CC-3 compatibility plus actual loaded sources, multidimensional verification claims, limitations, and claims not made.
verification_context_rule.legacy_v_role: V0-V5 remain Builder compatibility metadata only.
verification_context_rule.retired_v4_plus_v6_v8: V4+, V6, V7, and V8 are historical-only for new submissions; use digital_profile, physical_observation, and external_witness instead.

preferred_rule: Select the action first; actual loaded sources determine sufficiency. Do not require unrelated inherited materials or any fixed Chronicle stage model.
must_load_summary_scope: Base discovery, authority, action-selection, and interpretation-policy sources only. Add exact task-relevant sources and conditional Chronicle, legacy, evidence, correction, or physical materials as required by the selected claim.

current_model_precedence.rule: Actual sources and performed actions control sufficiency. Legacy CC, CRL, and V labels do not import retired stage or verification ladders.
